props.name: cellClassName
props.comment: A class name to apply to the cell element when used inside <DataTable>.

props.name: className
props.comment: A class name to apply to the root div element

props.name: headerClassName
props.comment: A class name to apply to the header cell element when used inside <DataTable>.

props.name: label
props.comment:
Label to use as column header when using <DataTable> or <SimpleShowLayout>.
Defaults to the capitalized field name. Set to false to disable the label.

props.name: offline
props.comment: Component to display when offline and the request is pending or has stale placeholder data.

props.name: queryOptions
props.type: UseQueryOptions<RaRecord<Identifier>[], Error, RaRecord<Identifier>[], readonly unknown[]> & { meta?: unknown }

props.name: sortable
props.comment: Set it to false to disable the click handler on the column header when used inside <DataTable>.

props.name: sortBy
props.comment: The field to use for sorting when users click this column head, if sortable.

props.name: sortByOrder
props.comment: The order used for sorting when users click this column head, if sortable.

props.name: textAlign
props.comment: The text alignment for the cell content, when used inside <DataTable>.
